#{{ experiment.index }} {{ experiment.commit[:7] }}
{{ experiment.status }}

{{ experiment.description }}

{{ report.metric_name }} {{ "%.4f"|format(experiment.metric_value) }}
{% if experiment.delta is not none and experiment.delta != 0 %}
{% set is_improvement = (report.metric_direction == "higher" and experiment.delta > 0) or (report.metric_direction == "lower" and experiment.delta < 0) %} {% if experiment.delta > 0 %}+{% endif %}{{ "%.4f"|format(experiment.delta) }} {% if experiment.delta_pct is not none %} ({{ "%+.2f"|format(experiment.delta_pct) }}%) {% endif %}
{% endif %}
